exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your stress management forward
items: Complete a comprehensive stress audit by tracking your stress levels, triggers, and physical symptoms for 7 consecutive days
Research and schedule appointments with three different stress management professionals (therapist, counselor, or stress coach)
Create a comprehensive inventory of your current coping mechanisms by listing and categorizing all the ways you currently handle stress
Identify and document your top 5 stress triggers by observing and recording specific situations, people, or environments that consistently elevate your stress levels
Research and test 3 different evidence-based stress reduction techniques by trying each for one week and documenting their effectiveness
Create a detailed personal stress management plan by setting 3 specific, measurable goals for reducing stress over the next 30 days
